territory.environment: The windiest, coldest, and most treacherous section of the Engineer's Mountain Range
territory.logic: Natural wind-tunnel where the Sky-Grazer herds are forced to migrate

culture.relationship: View city-dwelling Avians as soft, but Empire relies entirely on them for Voltaic Fleece

trap.pin: Frame clamps the beast against the padded cliff wall using buoyancy

pit-stop.shear: Repel down the cliff face using Obsidian Blades
pit-stop.milk: Attach high-suction hoses to drain the udder tanks
pit-stop.release: Frame counter-weights release, launching the Grazer back into the air stream

storm-grade.utility: Insulating at high temps, protecting airships from lightning

raw.utility: Sold to bakeries for static leavening, consumed by laborers for energy kick

refined.utility: Sold to Quill-Kin for anti-chaos medicine

tagging.role: The Harriers are the only ones who physically touch the herds
tagging.research: Tag the animals with paint or ribbons
tagging.data: Primary source of intel on 'The Vanishing,' reporting when specific animals disappear near Dragonstone Prisons
